name: Push-Triggered Workflow Spam
description: GitHub Actions workflows trigger on every push to master, causing duplicate runs when a session has many commits. The ideation workflow ran 10 times on 2026-03-21 but only 1 discussion was ever created.
detection: Workflow runs > 3 in a single day for the same workflow
action: Add rate limiting (max 1 per day) with dedup check against existing discussions/artifacts.
evidence: 2026-03-21: demerzel-ideation.yml triggered 10 times via push events
2026-03-22: Rate limiting fix applied to ideation workflow
resolution: Ideation workflow updated with daily dedup check 2026-03-22. Other workflows may need same fix.
